Setlist
   Live Trax Series    Previous | Next 

Released on

Tuesday, June 2, 2009

Artwork

View all artwork (9) Â»
Live Trax Vol. 15: 8.9.08 - Alpine Valley Music Theatre - East Troy, WI
Announced April 14, 2009 in the same e-mail as the official tracklisting off Big Whiskey and the GrooGrux King and first single announcement of "Funny the Way It Is."

The album artwork that was posted to the band's webstore prior to this release's announcement indicated that it was originally set to contain the 8.10.08 as well as 8.9.08. This was never announced, and the artwork had been modified to remove the reference to 8.10 by the time of the official announcement.

The full announcement came on April 21, 2009.

Jeff Coffin is uncredited in the album's liner notes.

Official Original DMB Release Notes:
Original announcement with Big Whiskey: Big Whiskey and the GrooGrux King will be available for Pre-Order later this week! Fans who Pre-Order will receive a free copy of the 3-CD set, Live Trax Vol. 15: 08.09.08 Alpine Valley Music Theatre, one of the most fan requested shows for live release!

Full announcement: Live Trax Vol. 15 is a show whose setlist speaks entirely for itself. One of the most fan-requested shows for live release, the show features a superb progression of songs. Highlights of the show are numerous, from Dancing Nancies (played rarely as opener), Halloween>Water into Wine and Spoon, a definitive surprise of the evening, making its return after a 5-year hiatus. Stefan's bass opening of Crush is memorable as is the fluid double encore of Don't Drink The Water into Two Step. DMB played a couple of covers for the crowd's pleasure, Pink Floyd's Money and Talking Heads' Burning Down the House. Live Trax Vol. 15 is available as a 3-CD set or download is free with the Pre-Order of Big Whiskey and the GrooGrux King. Due to production limitations, Live Trax Vol. 15 may only be available as a free bonus for a limited time so Pre-Order early to insure your copy!

The color hex code for the Live Trax Vol. 15 ribbon is #97544c.
